item.title: Learning Arabic (Mudaf and Mudaf Ilayhi) Part 2
item.description: Abstract : My notes and short explanation on Mudaf and Mudaf Ilayhi (Copied from Textbook) + Solution to Exercise. Textbook used in this notes: An Introduction to the Arabic Language Through Islamic Texts Vol I. Construct and Genitive (الْمُضَافُ وَالْمُضَافُ أِلَيْهِ) In english you say “Name of the book”. In arabic the structure is the same way with few grammatical rules are involved. The construction is called as “mudaaf-mudaaf ilayhi”. The first noun ins called “mudaaf” (construct) and second, “mudaaf ilayhi” (Genitive).

item.title: Learning Arabic (Marifah and Nakirah) Part 1
item.description: Abstract : My notes and short explanation on Marifah and Nakirah (Copied from Textbook) + Solution to Exercise.

item.title: Why Reading Tao's Analysis
item.description: Abstract : An Introduction to Book reading journey on Analysis I by Terence Tao.

item.title: Faith is Not Blind Conformity
item.description: Abstract: The modern phenomenon has already created stereotypes of what faith and religion are, often assumed to be blind conformity or merely following traditions that undermine reason. In fact, true faith only exists after certainty arises, and one cannot claim faith is valid without certainty, both in a rational and spiritual sense. Not many religions encourage knowledge, reason, and breaking away from authoritative traditions, but Islam does.

item.title: It's all about dynamics
item.description: Abstract : Phenomena as we perceive it are dynamics in essence.

item.title: Collection of Useful Terms
item.description: Abstract : Definition, or explanation of many terms that I find useful.

item.title: File-over-app Digital Philosophy
item.description: Abstract : I move beyond digital apps when it comes notes taking and journaling, why? Because controlling raw resources file is important. File over app is a philosophy where you get to control all file with formats that easy to read over long period of time, no matter how developed technology is. My aim is to create a digital artifact on my works.

item.title: The Importance of Theory of Knowledge
item.description: Abstract : I express the importance of theory of knowledge (epistemology) as acquisition and justification of belief systems. This essay emphasizes the significance of epistemology as a foundational tool for understanding the limitations of knowledge, and how to navigate the abundance of information and knowledge in the modern world. Epistemological inquiry is path of humility, yet path to the truth.

item.title: Formations of the Secular: Christianity, Islam, Modernity
Orientalism: Western Conceptions of the Orient
The Anatomy of Knowledge & the Ontological Necessity of First Principle
The Impossible State: Islam, Politics, and Modernity’s Moral Predicament
The Rise and Triumph of the Modern Self: Cultural Amnesia, Expressive Individualism, and the Road to Sexual Revolution
about
item.description: I am Muhammad Gaffar, a Muslim and PhD student. This blog is a collection of notes, essays, and mini libraries. Although formally doing physics, but the posts will cover range of my interests, see tags below.
